T0096.title: Fuzzy Lookup
T0096.definition: Also known as 'lm,' this is a common fuzzy search technique used in underground social engineering databases to locate and extract information on a specific target. For instance, a user might search for a common name, and the system returns multiple records with fields like birthday, region, and gender. Using these auxiliary details, the searcher can pinpoint the exact record they need from a sea of similar entries.
